title: clinopodium fauriei var. japonicum
intro: Clinopodium fauriei var. japonicum, also known as Japanese mountain mint, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Clinopodium fauriei var. japonicum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from headaches. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
